title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Digital Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Digital Global Group! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Digital Global Group:
Reliance Digital Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
